content.json:
# Microsoft Marketplace Readiness Auditor
This workbook separates **measured platform readiness** from **manual publishing, transaction, and GTM readiness**.

This workbook reads **Azure Resource Graph metadata only**. It can score Azure-visible platform signals such as product surface, edge entry points, orchestration, telemetry, secrets, identity, state, and network posture. It does **not** inspect Partner Center, source code, marketplace APIs, Microsoft Entra app registrations, tax or payout setup, co-sell status, or listing copy.

## Readiness Model
1. **Platform readiness**: measured here from Azure resources.
2. **Publishing readiness**: manual checks in Partner Center.
3. **Transaction readiness**: manual checks by offer type.
4. **GTM readiness**: manual checks for leads, co-sell, and commercial motion.

parameters.name: Subscription
parameters.label: Subscriptions
parameters.query:
Resources
| summarize ResourceCount = count() by subscriptionId
| order by ResourceCount desc
| extend Rank = row_number()
| project value = subscriptionId, label = subscriptionId, selected = Rank <= 3

parameters.name: ResourceGroup
parameters.label: Resource group scope
parameters.description: The deployment resource group only stores the workbook. This selector controls which resource group is analyzed.
parameters.query:
resourcecontainers
| where type =~ 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions'
| project value = subscriptionId, label = strcat(subscriptionId, ' / (all resource groups)'), selected = true, sortOrder = 0
| union (
resourcecontainers
| where type =~ 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups'
| project value = strcat(subscriptionId, '|', name), label = strcat(subscriptionId, ' / ', name), selected = false, sortOrder = 1
)
| order by sortOrder asc, label asc
| project value, label, selected

content.json: The deployment blade asks for a resource group because the workbook resource has to live somewhere. The **Resource group scope** selector above controls what this workbook actually analyzes.

content.query:
Resources
| where '{ResourceGroup}' == subscriptionId or strcat(subscriptionId, '|', resourceGroup) =~ '{ResourceGroup}'
| summarize ProductSurface = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.web/staticsites' or type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' or type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps' or type =~ 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters' or type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applications' or type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applicationdefinitions'), CustomerEntryPoints = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' or type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles' or type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles/afdendpoints' or type =~ 'microsoft.network/frontdoors' or type =~ 'microsoft.web/staticsites' or (type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and tobool(properties.httpsOnly)) or (type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps' and tobool(properties.configuration.ingress.external))), IntegrationPlane = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' or type =~ 'microsoft.logic/workflows' or (type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and kind has 'functionapp')), ObservabilityAssets = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.insights/components' or type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'), DurableStateOrMessaging = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts' or type =~ 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases' or type =~ 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts' or type =~ 'microsoft.servicebus/namespaces' or type =~ 'microsoft.eventgrid/systemtopics'), KeyVaults = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults'), IdentityEnabledResources = countif(isnotempty(tostring(identity.type))), PrivateEndpoints = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.network/privateendpoints'), PublicAccessDisabled = countif((type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled') or (type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled') or (type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled') or (type =~ 'microsoft.sql/servers' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled') or (type =~ 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled'))
| extend PlatformReadinessScore = 30 * iff(ProductSurface > 0 and CustomerEntryPoints > 0, 1, 0) + 15 * iff(IntegrationPlane > 0, 1, 0) + 15 * iff(ObservabilityAssets > 0, 1, 0) + 15 * iff(DurableStateOrMessaging > 0, 1, 0) + 15 * iff(KeyVaults > 0 and IdentityEnabledResources > 0, 1, 0) + 10 * iff(PrivateEndpoints > 0 or PublicAccessDisabled > 0, 1, 0)
| extend PassedChecks = toint(iff(ProductSurface > 0 and CustomerEntryPoints > 0, 1, 0) + iff(IntegrationPlane > 0, 1, 0) + iff(ObservabilityAssets > 0, 1, 0) + iff(DurableStateOrMessaging > 0, 1, 0) + iff(KeyVaults > 0 and IdentityEnabledResources > 0, 1, 0) + iff(PrivateEndpoints > 0 or PublicAccessDisabled > 0, 1, 0))
| extend TotalChecks = 6
| extend MissingChecks = TotalChecks - PassedChecks
content.title: Platform Readiness Summary
content.noDataMessage: No resources found in the selected subscriptions.

content.query:
(Resources
| where '{ResourceGroup}' == subscriptionId or strcat(subscriptionId, '|', resourceGroup) =~ '{ResourceGroup}'
| summarize ProductSurface = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.web/staticsites' or type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' or type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps' or type =~ 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters' or type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applications' or type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applicationdefinitions'), CustomerEntryPoints = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' or type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles' or type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles/afdendpoints' or type =~ 'microsoft.network/frontdoors' or type =~ 'microsoft.web/staticsites' or (type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and tobool(properties.httpsOnly)) or (type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps' and tobool(properties.configuration.ingress.external))), IntegrationPlane = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' or type =~ 'microsoft.logic/workflows' or (type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and kind has 'functionapp')), ObservabilityAssets = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.insights/components' or type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'), DurableStateOrMessaging = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts' or type =~ 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases' or type =~ 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts' or type =~ 'microsoft.servicebus/namespaces' or type =~ 'microsoft.eventgrid/systemtopics'), KeyVaults = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults'), IdentityEnabledResources = countif(isnotempty(tostring(identity.type))), PrivateEndpoints = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.network/privateendpoints'), PublicAccessDisabled = countif((type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled') or (type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled') or (type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled') or (type =~ 'microsoft.sql/servers' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled') or (type =~ 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled'))
| project Status = 'Passed', Checks = toint(iff(ProductSurface > 0 and CustomerEntryPoints > 0, 1, 0) + iff(IntegrationPlane > 0, 1, 0) + iff(ObservabilityAssets > 0, 1, 0) + iff(DurableStateOrMessaging > 0, 1, 0) + iff(KeyVaults > 0 and IdentityEnabledResources > 0, 1, 0) + iff(PrivateEndpoints > 0 or PublicAccessDisabled > 0, 1, 0)))
| union
(Resources
| where '{ResourceGroup}' == subscriptionId or strcat(subscriptionId, '|', resourceGroup) =~ '{ResourceGroup}'
| summarize ProductSurface = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.web/staticsites' or type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' or type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps' or type =~ 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters' or type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applications' or type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applicationdefinitions'), CustomerEntryPoints = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' or type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles' or type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles/afdendpoints' or type =~ 'microsoft.network/frontdoors' or type =~ 'microsoft.web/staticsites' or (type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and tobool(properties.httpsOnly)) or (type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps' and tobool(properties.configuration.ingress.external))), IntegrationPlane = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' or type =~ 'microsoft.logic/workflows' or (type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and kind has 'functionapp')), ObservabilityAssets = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.insights/components' or type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'), DurableStateOrMessaging = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts' or type =~ 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases' or type =~ 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts' or type =~ 'microsoft.servicebus/namespaces' or type =~ 'microsoft.eventgrid/systemtopics'), KeyVaults = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults'), IdentityEnabledResources = countif(isnotempty(tostring(identity.type))), PrivateEndpoints = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.network/privateendpoints'), PublicAccessDisabled = countif((type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled') or (type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled') or (type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled') or (type =~ 'microsoft.sql/servers' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled') or (type =~ 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled'))
| project Status = 'Missing', Checks = toint(6 - (iff(ProductSurface > 0 and CustomerEntryPoints > 0, 1, 0) + iff(IntegrationPlane > 0, 1, 0) + iff(ObservabilityAssets > 0, 1, 0) + iff(DurableStateOrMessaging > 0, 1, 0) + iff(KeyVaults > 0 and IdentityEnabledResources > 0, 1, 0) + iff(PrivateEndpoints > 0 or PublicAccessDisabled > 0, 1, 0))))
content.title: Passed vs Missing Measured Checks
content.noDataMessage: No checks could be computed from the selected subscriptions.

items.name: query - passed vs missing measured checks

content.query:
Resources
| where '{ResourceGroup}' == subscriptionId or strcat(subscriptionId, '|', resourceGroup) =~ '{ResourceGroup}'
| summarize ManagedAppAssets = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applications' or type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applicationdefinitions'), ProductSurface = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.web/staticsites' or type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' or type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps' or type =~ 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters'), CustomerEntryPoints = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' or type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles' or type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles/afdendpoints' or type =~ 'microsoft.network/frontdoors' or type =~ 'microsoft.web/staticsites' or (type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and tobool(properties.httpsOnly)) or (type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps' and tobool(properties.configuration.ingress.external))), IntegrationPlane = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' or type =~ 'microsoft.logic/workflows' or (type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and kind has 'functionapp'))
| extend RecommendedPath = case(ManagedAppAssets > 0, 'Azure Managed Application', ProductSurface > 0 and CustomerEntryPoints > 0 and IntegrationPlane > 0, 'SaaS or Container Offer', ProductSurface > 0 and CustomerEntryPoints > 0, 'Customer-facing offer, technical transaction path not evident', ProductSurface > 0, 'Services-first listing with implementation', 'Build product surface first')
| extend Confidence = case(ManagedAppAssets > 0, 'High', ProductSurface > 0 and CustomerEntryPoints > 0 and IntegrationPlane > 0, 'Medium', ProductSurface > 0 and CustomerEntryPoints > 0, 'Medium', ProductSurface > 0, 'Low', 'Low')
| extend Rationale = case(ManagedAppAssets > 0, 'Managed application artifacts exist in Azure.', ProductSurface > 0 and CustomerEntryPoints > 0 and IntegrationPlane > 0, 'A deployable product surface, customer entry point, and backend integration plane are all visible.', ProductSurface > 0 and CustomerEntryPoints > 0, 'The subscription shows a customer-facing surface, but not the fulfillment or orchestration layer most transactable offers need.', ProductSurface > 0, 'There is something product-like in Azure, but little evidence of a customer entry point or transaction workflow.', 'Azure does not currently expose a clear product surface in the selected resource group scope.')
| project RecommendedPath, Confidence, ManagedAppAssets, ProductSurface, CustomerEntryPoints, IntegrationPlane, Rationale
content.title: Observed Offer Path
content.noDataMessage: No offer path could be inferred from the selected subscriptions.

content.query:
(Resources
| where '{ResourceGroup}' == subscriptionId or strcat(subscriptionId, '|', resourceGroup) =~ '{ResourceGroup}'
| summarize ProductSurface = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.web/staticsites' or type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' or type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps' or type =~ 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters' or type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applications' or type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applicationdefinitions'), CustomerEntryPoints = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' or type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles' or type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles/afdendpoints' or type =~ 'microsoft.network/frontdoors' or type =~ 'microsoft.web/staticsites' or (type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and tobool(properties.httpsOnly)) or (type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps' and tobool(properties.configuration.ingress.external)))
| project Check = 'Customer-facing product surface', Status = iff(ProductSurface > 0 and CustomerEntryPoints > 0, 'Passed', 'Missing'), Weight = 30, Evidence = strcat(ProductSurface, ' product resources, ', CustomerEntryPoints, ' entry assets'), WhyItMatters = 'Marketplace motion starts with a customer-visible product surface that users can actually reach.', RecommendedAction = 'Pair the product workload with a clear public entry point such as Static Web Apps, App Service, Front Door, or API Management.')
| union
(Resources
| where '{ResourceGroup}' == subscriptionId or strcat(subscriptionId, '|', resourceGroup) =~ '{ResourceGroup}'
| summarize IntegrationPlane = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' or type =~ 'microsoft.logic/workflows' or (type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and kind has 'functionapp'))
| project Check = 'Integration or provisioning plane', Status = iff(IntegrationPlane > 0, 'Passed', 'Missing'), Weight = 15, Evidence = strcat(IntegrationPlane, ' orchestration assets found'), WhyItMatters = 'Transactable offers usually need webhook handling, provisioning logic, or API orchestration.', RecommendedAction = 'Add API Management, Logic Apps, or Functions for provisioning and fulfillment workflows.')
| union
(Resources
| where '{ResourceGroup}' == subscriptionId or strcat(subscriptionId, '|', resourceGroup) =~ '{ResourceGroup}'
| summarize ObservabilityAssets = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.insights/components' or type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces')
| project Check = 'Observability', Status = iff(ObservabilityAssets > 0, 'Passed', 'Missing'), Weight = 15, Evidence = strcat(ObservabilityAssets, ' observability assets found'), WhyItMatters = 'Technical review and production operations both depend on telemetry.', RecommendedAction = 'Add Application Insights or Log Analytics and wire in workload telemetry.')
| union
(Resources
| where '{ResourceGroup}' == subscriptionId or strcat(subscriptionId, '|', resourceGroup) =~ '{ResourceGroup}'
| summarize DurableStateOrMessaging = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts' or type =~ 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases' or type =~ 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts' or type =~ 'microsoft.servicebus/namespaces' or type =~ 'microsoft.eventgrid/systemtopics')
| project Check = 'Durable state or messaging', Status = iff(DurableStateOrMessaging > 0, 'Passed', 'Missing'), Weight = 15, Evidence = strcat(DurableStateOrMessaging, ' state or messaging assets found'), WhyItMatters = 'Lifecycle events, entitlements, and tenant workflows usually need durable state or async processing.', RecommendedAction = 'Add storage, SQL, Cosmos DB, Service Bus, or Event Grid.')
| union
(Resources
| where '{ResourceGroup}' == subscriptionId or strcat(subscriptionId, '|', resourceGroup) =~ '{ResourceGroup}'
| summarize KeyVaults = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults'), IdentityEnabledResources = countif(isnotempty(tostring(identity.type)))
| project Check = 'Secrets and workload identity', Status = iff(KeyVaults > 0 and IdentityEnabledResources > 0, 'Passed', 'Missing'), Weight = 15, Evidence = strcat(KeyVaults, ' key vaults, ', IdentityEnabledResources, ' identity-enabled resources'), WhyItMatters = 'A marketplace-grade product should avoid embedded secrets and weak credential handling.', RecommendedAction = 'Use Key Vault plus managed identity on the workload.')
| union
(Resources
| where '{ResourceGroup}' == subscriptionId or strcat(subscriptionId, '|', resourceGroup) =~ '{ResourceGroup}'
| summarize PrivateEndpoints = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.network/privateendpoints'), PublicAccessDisabled = countif((type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled') or (type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled') or (type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled') or (type =~ 'microsoft.sql/servers' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled') or (type =~ 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled'))
| project Check = 'Network hardening signals', Status = iff(PrivateEndpoints > 0 or PublicAccessDisabled > 0, 'Passed', 'Missing'), Weight = 10, Evidence = strcat(PrivateEndpoints, ' private endpoints, ', PublicAccessDisabled, ' resources with public access disabled'), WhyItMatters = 'Private connectivity or explicit public network restrictions improve enterprise readiness.', RecommendedAction = 'Add private endpoints or disable public access on supporting services where appropriate.')
| extend PointsAwarded = iff(Status == 'Passed', Weight, 0)
| order by Status asc, Weight desc
content.title: Measured Check Matrix
content.noDataMessage: No detailed checks could be computed from the selected subscriptions.

content.query:
Resources
| where '{ResourceGroup}' == subscriptionId or strcat(subscriptionId, '|', resourceGroup) =~ '{ResourceGroup}'
| summarize StaticSites = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.web/staticsites'), WebApps = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites'), ContainerApps = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps'), ManagedKubernetes = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters'), ManagedApplications = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applications' or type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applicationdefinitions'), FrontDoorProfiles = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles'), FrontDoorEndpoints = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles/afdendpoints'), ApiManagement = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service'), FunctionApps = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and kind has 'functionapp'), LogicApps = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.logic/workflows'), ManagedEnvironments = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.app/managedenvironments'), AppInsights = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.insights/components'), LogAnalytics = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'), KeyVaults = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults'), StorageAccounts = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts'), SqlDatabases = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases'), CosmosAccounts = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts'), ServiceBusNamespaces = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.servicebus/namespaces'), EventGridTopics = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.eventgrid/systemtopics'), PrivateEndpoints = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.network/privateendpoints')
content.title: Measured Signal Summary
content.noDataMessage: No relevant resources found in the selected subscriptions.

content.query:
Resources
| where '{ResourceGroup}' == subscriptionId or strcat(subscriptionId, '|', resourceGroup) =~ '{ResourceGroup}'
| where type =~ 'microsoft.web/staticsites' or type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' or type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps' or type =~ 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters' or type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applications' or type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applicationdefinitions' or type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' or type =~ 'microsoft.logic/workflows' or (type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and kind has 'functionapp') or type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles' or type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles/afdendpoints' or type =~ 'microsoft.network/frontdoors' or type =~ 'microsoft.insights/components' or type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces' or type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults' or type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts' or type =~ 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases' or type =~ 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts' or type =~ 'microsoft.servicebus/namespaces' or type =~ 'microsoft.eventgrid/systemtopics' or type =~ 'microsoft.network/privateendpoints' or type =~ 'microsoft.app/managedenvironments'
| summarize Resources = count() by Capability = case(type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles' or type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles/afdendpoints' or type =~ 'microsoft.network/frontdoors', 'Edge delivery', type =~ 'microsoft.web/staticsites' or type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' or type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps' or type =~ 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters', 'Product surface', type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applications' or type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applicationdefinitions', 'Managed application packaging', type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' or type =~ 'microsoft.logic/workflows' or (type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and kind has 'functionapp'), 'Integration plane', type =~ 'microsoft.app/managedenvironments', 'Runtime substrate', type =~ 'microsoft.insights/components' or type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'Observability', type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults', 'Secrets management', type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts' or type =~ 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases' or type =~ 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts' or type =~ 'microsoft.servicebus/namespaces' or type =~ 'microsoft.eventgrid/systemtopics', 'Durable state or messaging', type =~ 'microsoft.network/privateendpoints', 'Private connectivity', 'Other')
| order by Resources desc
content.title: Capability Distribution
content.noDataMessage: No relevant platform resources were found in the selected subscriptions.

content.query:
Resources
| where '{ResourceGroup}' == subscriptionId or strcat(subscriptionId, '|', resourceGroup) =~ '{ResourceGroup}'
| where type =~ 'microsoft.web/staticsites' or type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' or type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps' or type =~ 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters' or type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applications' or type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applicationdefinitions' or type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' or type =~ 'microsoft.logic/workflows' or (type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and kind has 'functionapp') or type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles' or type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles/afdendpoints' or type =~ 'microsoft.network/frontdoors' or type =~ 'microsoft.insights/components' or type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces' or type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults' or type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts' or type =~ 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases' or type =~ 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts' or type =~ 'microsoft.servicebus/namespaces' or type =~ 'microsoft.eventgrid/systemtopics' or type =~ 'microsoft.network/privateendpoints' or type =~ 'microsoft.app/managedenvironments'
| extend Capability = case(type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles' or type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles/afdendpoints' or type =~ 'microsoft.network/frontdoors', 'Edge delivery', type =~ 'microsoft.web/staticsites' or type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' or type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps' or type =~ 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters', 'Product surface', type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applications' or type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applicationdefinitions', 'Managed application packaging', type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' or type =~ 'microsoft.logic/workflows' or (type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and kind has 'functionapp'), 'Integration plane', type =~ 'microsoft.app/managedenvironments', 'Runtime substrate', type =~ 'microsoft.insights/components' or type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'Observability', type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults', 'Secrets management', type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts' or type =~ 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases' or type =~ 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts' or type =~ 'microsoft.servicebus/namespaces' or type =~ 'microsoft.eventgrid/systemtopics', 'Durable state or messaging', type =~ 'microsoft.network/privateendpoints', 'Private connectivity', 'Other')
| project Name = name, Capability, Type = type, Kind = coalesce(kind, ''), Subscription = subscriptionId, ResourceGroup = resourceGroup, Location = location, Identity = coalesce(tostring(identity.type), 'None')
| order by Capability asc, Name asc
content.title: Relevant Resource Inventory
content.noDataMessage: No relevant platform resources were found in the selected subscriptions.

content.query:
Resources
| where '{ResourceGroup}' == subscriptionId or strcat(subscriptionId, '|', resourceGroup) =~ '{ResourceGroup}'
| where type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles' or type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles/afdendpoints' or type =~ 'microsoft.network/frontdoors' or type =~ 'microsoft.web/staticsites' or type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' or type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps' or type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' or type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults' or type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts' or type =~ 'microsoft.sql/servers' or type =~ 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts' or type =~ 'microsoft.network/privateendpoints'
| extend ExposureSignal = case(type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles' or type =~ 'microsoft.cdn/profiles/afdendpoints' or type =~ 'microsoft.network/frontdoors', 'Public edge endpoint', type =~ 'microsoft.web/staticsites', 'Static web endpoint', type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites', iff(tobool(properties.httpsOnly), 'Web app with HTTPS only', 'Web app without HTTPS only'), type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps' and tobool(properties.configuration.ingress.external), 'Container app with external ingress', type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps', 'Container app without external ingress', type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled', 'API Management private only', type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service', 'API Management public or mixed', type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled', 'Key Vault public access disabled', type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults', 'Key Vault public access enabled or unspecified', type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled', 'Storage public access disabled', type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts', 'Storage public access enabled or unspecified', type =~ 'microsoft.sql/servers' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled', 'SQL public access disabled', type =~ 'microsoft.sql/servers', 'SQL public access enabled or unspecified', type =~ 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) =~ 'Disabled', 'Cosmos public access disabled', type =~ 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts', 'Cosmos public access enabled or unspecified', type =~ 'microsoft.network/privateendpoints', 'Private endpoint', 'Signal not reported')
| extend IdentitySignal = case(isnotempty(tostring(identity.type)), tostring(identity.type), type =~ 'microsoft.network/privateendpoints', 'n/a', 'None')
| project Name = name, Type = type, ResourceGroup = resourceGroup, Location = location, ExposureSignal, IdentitySignal
| order by Type asc, Name asc
content.title: Exposure And Identity Signals
content.noDataMessage: No exposure or identity signals were found for the selected subscriptions.

content.json:
Use **Partner Center** as the source of truth for these items.

- Choose the correct offer type and listing option for the motion you actually want: SaaS, Azure Application, Container, VM, or services-led listing.
- Complete discoverability metadata: title, summary, description, categories, subcategories, keywords, screenshots, videos, and useful links.
- Provide support and legal assets: privacy policy, terms if applicable, support URL, support contact, and engineering contact.
- Configure lead routing so marketplace leads land in the right CRM or endpoint.
- Prepare preview or validation workflow before you submit for certification.

Reference docs:
- [Categories and subcategories](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/partner-center/marketplace-offers/categories)
- [Review and publish an offer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/partner-center/marketplace-offers/review-publish-offer)
- [Marketplace certification policies](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/legal/marketplace/certification-policies)

Match the checklist to the offer type you intend to publish.

**SaaS offers**
- Decide whether the offer is only `Contact me` or actually transactable.
- For transactable SaaS, confirm the landing page, connection webhook, Microsoft Entra app registration, and fulfillment/metering path are ready.

**Azure Application offers**
- Decide whether this is a `Managed application` or `Solution template` plan.
- Remember that managed application pricing is for the management fee, not the customer's underlying Azure infrastructure or IP/software costs.

**VM and Container offers**
- Expect technical validation and certification workflow specific to the asset type.
- Treat packaging, image integrity, and deployment validation as separate readiness gates from Azure architecture alone.

Reference docs:
- [Plan a SaaS offer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/partner-center/marketplace-offers/plan-saas-offer)
- [Create SaaS offer technical details](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/partner-center/marketplace-offers/create-new-saas-offer-technical)
- [Plan an Azure Application offer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/partner-center/marketplace-offers/plan-azure-application-offer)
- [Prepare technical assets for Azure Application](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/partner-center/marketplace-offers/prepare-technical-assets)

- Confirm your commercial lead flow is wired correctly and tested end to end.
- Prepare seller-facing collateral if you want co-sell motion: one-pager, pitch deck, regional sales contact, and clear Azure value story.
- Separate platform readiness from commercial eligibility: Azure IP co-sell, MACC or Azure benefit eligibility, pricing plans, and private offers are all extra gates.
- Make sure the offer economics and lifecycle are coherent before you publish: trial, paid plans, metering, renewals, and support handoff.

Reference docs:
- [Get customer leads from your commercial marketplace offer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/partner-center/marketplace-offers/commercial-marketplace-get-customer-leads)
- [Co-sell overview](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/partner-center/referrals/co-sell-overview)
- [Azure consumption commitment enrollment](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/partner-center/marketplace-offers/azure-consumption-commitment-enrollment)

This workbook should be treated as a **platform readiness auditor**, not a full marketplace certification or Partner Center audit. It cannot verify publisher agreements, Partner Center enrollment, payout setup, listing copy, preview audience, co-sell status, Azure benefit eligibility, or fulfillment API correctness from Azure Resource Graph alone.

> Publisher note: replace this block with your own booking link, lead form, or implementation sprint offer.

Suggested use:
1. Run the measured platform score and inspect the failed checks.
2. Walk the publishing, transaction, and GTM checklists with Partner Center open.
3. Turn the missing platform checks into implementation work and the manual checklist gaps into publishing work.
4. Re-run the workbook after architecture changes to verify the Azure-visible posture improved.
